transcript: Stayed indoors most of the day because of the rain, which suited me fine. Spent the afternoon reading and then had a bit of a cry, which actually felt quite good in a way. I found an old postcard tucked inside my book, from John, written on a work trip to Edinburgh. Just silly little things on it, something about the weather and a pub he liked. But I kept reading it over and over. Went to bed early.
